meta.title: Royal Auto Finishes | Premium Auto Detailing & Ceramic Coating Austin TX
meta.description: 5-star rated premium auto detailing in Austin. Ceramic coatings, paint correction, and flawless finishes. Book with Royal Auto Finishes — (512) 888-9949.

hero.headline: Your car. Royally finished.
hero.subheadline: Ceramic coatings, paint correction, and concierge-grade detailing for Austin's most-loved vehicles. We come to you.

features.title: Mobile Service
features.desc: We detail at your home or office — no waiting rooms, no drop-offs.

features.title: Ceramic Certified
features.desc: Manufacturer-trained applicators. Up to 5-year paint protection warranties.

features.title: Royal Guarantee
features.desc: If you're not thrilled, we're not done. Every detail backed 100%.

services.title: Full Interior Detail
services.desc: Deep steam extraction, leather conditioning, UV protection, odor elimination. Cabin restored to showroom.

services.title: Paint Correction + Wax
services.desc: Two-stage machine polish removes swirls and holograms. Finished with premium carnauba for a mirror gloss.

services.title: Ceramic Coating — 3 Year
services.desc: 9H-hardness nano-ceramic. Hydrophobic, UV-resistant, unbeatable depth. Backed by a 3-year warranty.

services.title: Ceramic Coating — 5 Year
services.desc: Two-layer flagship protection. Includes paint correction prep, wheels, trim, and glass. Our royal standard.

services.title: Paint Protection Film
services.desc: Self-healing clear bra on high-impact panels. Invisible protection against rock chips and scratches.

services.title: Maintenance Wash Plan
services.desc: Keep your coating performing. Monthly hand wash, decon, and top-up spray. Priority booking.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: These guys did a 5-year ceramic on my F-150 and I honestly can't stop staring at it. Water beads off like magic. Worth every dollar.

reviews.name: Elena R.
reviews.text: Booked the mobile interior detail. They showed up on time, brought their own water and power, and my Tesla looked brand new in three hours.

reviews.name: Jordan K.
reviews.text: Paint correction on my older M3 was unreal. Swirls I'd lived with for years — gone. The team actually cares about the craft.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Absolute professionals. Explained every step, sent photos while working, and the final result speaks for itself. Austin's best.

faq.question: Do you come to me?
faq.answer: Yes. Our mobile team serves all of Austin and surrounding areas including Round Rock, Cedar Park, Pflugerville, and Buda. We bring water, power, and all materials.

faq.question: How long does a ceramic coating take?
faq.answer: A standard 3-year coating is typically a 1-day job. The 5-year flagship with full paint correction is usually 2 days for flawless prep and curing.

faq.question: What's the difference between a wax and a ceramic coating?
faq.answer: A wax lasts 2–3 months. A ceramic coating is a semi-permanent nano-bond that lasts 3–5 years, is far more hydrophobic, and resists UV, bird droppings, and light scratches.

faq.question: How soon can I drive after a ceramic coating?
faq.answer: You can drive immediately. We recommend avoiding heavy rain or car washes for the first 7 days to let the coating fully cure.

faq.question: Do you offer any warranty?
faq.answer: Yes — 3 or 5-year written warranty on our ceramic coatings, with an optional yearly inspection to keep it valid.
